calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-30-2022 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-26-2022 Off Calendar

MOTION FOR LEAVE TO To Amend Answer To Complaint
Off Calendar Oct-24-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS JUAN PEREZ AND NORMA CHUN'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO Amend Answer To Complaint.

Defendants' motion "for leave to file an amended answer to the first amended complaint" is granted. "That trial courts are to liberally permit such amendments, at any stage of the proceeding, has been established policy in this state since 1901." (Hirsa v. Sup. Ct. (1981) 118 Cal.App.3d 486, 488-89; see also CCP sec 428.50(c).)

Prevailing party to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the substantive portion of the Court's ruling and in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/RBU)
